listings.name: Circle K (Pelham Truck Stop)
listings.description: Fuel/convenience truck stop at I-65 Exit 246 (AL-119 / Cahaba Valley Rd) in Pelham. Listed across truck directories as a truck stop with diesel, showers, a hosted CAT Scale and truck parking. Open 24 hours.
listings.corroboration: Address, city, ZIP and I-65 Exit 246 location corroborated by Circle K official store locator plus multiple independent truck directories (Find Truck Service, Trucker Path, TruckMap). Truck-stop function (diesel/showers/CAT Scale) consistent across sources. Truck-space count left blank because only unverified aggregator figures were found.

listings.name: CAT Scale — Circle K, Pelham
listings.description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at the Circle K truck stop at I-65 Exit 246 (AL-119 / Cahaba Valley Rd), Pelham.
listings.corroboration: CAT Scale presence at 715 Cahaba Valley Rd, Pelham corroborated by TruckMap, 4RoadService and Find Truck Service; host truck stop is the co-located Circle K. Phone left blank (only a single unverified number was found). CAT Scale official locator (catscale.com) blocked by egress policy so could not be fetched directly.

listings.name: Speed Trac Truck Stop (Calera Citgo/Speed Trac)
listings.description: Independent 24-hour truck stop on AL-25 (Highway 25) near I-65 Exit 228 in Calera. Directory and social listings describe diesel, showers, a 24/7 store/restaurant, truckers lounge, laundry and truck/overnight parking. Currently branded Citgo/Speed Trac.
listings.corroboration: Facility existence, Calera location and truck-stop function corroborated by Yelp, Facebook business page (Calera Citgo/Speedtrac Truckstop), TruckMap and Loc8NearMe. AL-25 meets I-65 at Exit 228. Address digits vary slightly between sources (11843 vs 11845 Hwy 25); 11845 used as the truck-stop entity address. Truck-space count and free/paid status left blank (only unverified aggregator figures found).

listings.name: Speedway Travel Center — Finley Blvd, Birmingham
listings.description: New 24/7 Speedway travel center opened September 2024 at the Finley Blvd exit of I-65 (Exit 262B) in Birmingham, offering diesel and fuel. Described in local press as a full-service travel center.
listings.hold_reason: Dedicated truck parking / truck-stop category-fit not independently confirmed — sources describe it primarily as a fuel and convenience travel center; a single aggregator mention of ~10 truck spaces is uncorroborated. Also sits at Exit 262B, just north of the nominal seg4 top (Exit 261). Hold for confirmation of truck accommodation before publishing.
listings.corroboration: Existence, address (1617 Finley Blvd), 24/7 operation and I-65 Finley Blvd/Exit 262B location corroborated by Bham Now, Here Birmingham, iExit and Speedway's own store locator. Truck-parking capacity and truck-stop suitability not independently confirmed, so held.

excluded.name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash — Birmingham
excluded.reason: Listed as 'Coming Soon' / not yet open on Blue Beacon's site (planned at ~2401 20th St N, I-65 Exit 262B). Excluded as not-yet-operating; also just north of segment.

excluded.name: Pilot Travel Center / ONE9 (3201 Buttermilk Rd)
excluded.reason: Located on I-20/I-59 at Exit 77 in Cottondale, not on I-65 — outside seg4. Initial directory snippet mis-associated it with Alabaster Exit 238.

excluded.name: Speedco Truck Lube & Tires (Buttermilk Rd)
excluded.reason: On I-20/I-59 in Cottondale, not I-65 in the Birmingham metro segment. No Speedco/Love's Truck Care found on I-65 exits 228-261.

excluded.name: Pilot Travel Center / Flying J #602 (Daniel Payne Dr)
excluded.reason: At I-65 Exit 264 (Daniel Payne Dr), north of the seg4 range (exits 228-261).

excluded.name: Love's Travel Stop
excluded.reason: Nearest I-65 Love's locations are Prichard (Exit 8) and Cullman (Exit 305) — both far outside the Birmingham-metro segment.
